home.features.subtitle: Capabilities
home.features.title: Everything you need to build faster.
home.features.1.title: AI-Powered Brainstorming
home.features.1.desc: Transform raw concepts into structured product modules through intelligent, context-aware conversation.
home.features.2.title: PRD Generator
home.features.2.desc: Generate comprehensive technical documents — User Stories, Acceptance Criteria, and system architecture — in one session.
home.features.3.title: Ready-to-Use Prompts
home.features.3.desc: A curated collection of prompts optimized for modern development frameworks and AI coding assistants.
home.features.4.title: Minimalist & Focused
home.features.4.desc: A distraction-free workspace designed specifically for architectural thinking and product ideation.
home.features.5.title: Export to Markdown
home.features.5.desc: Seamlessly send your specifications to GitHub, Obsidian, Notion, or any Markdown-compatible platform.
home.features.6.title: Vibe Coding Ready
home.features.6.desc: Outputs structured for LLM comprehension — enabling AI-assisted code generation from your PRD.
home.steps.subtitle: Process
home.steps.title: Just 3 Steps to MVP.
home.steps.desc: A streamlined process for maximum efficiency.
home.steps.1.title: Describe Your Vision
home.steps.1.desc: Share your application concept in natural language. No formal requirements needed — the AI handles the structure.
home.steps.2.title: Iterative Refinement
home.steps.2.desc: The AI asks targeted questions to ensure every critical feature, edge case, and technical constraint is captured.
home.steps.3.title: Export Your PRD
home.steps.3.desc: Receive a production-ready technical document that your development team can execute immediately.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.subtitle: Documentation
docs.desc: Welcome to VICO documentation. Learn how to use the AI-powered PRD Generator to transform your ideas into structured product requirement documents.
docs.step1.title: 1. Open PRD Generator
docs.step1.desc: Navigate to the PRD Generator page from the navigation bar. You'll see a split-screen layout with the chat interface on the left and the PRD preview on the right.
docs.step2.title: 2. Describe Your Idea
docs.step2.desc: Type your product idea in the chat. Be as detailed or as brief as you like — the AI will ask follow-up questions to fill in the gaps.
docs.step3.title: 3. Review & Download
docs.step3.desc: Once the AI generates the PRD, review each tab (Overview, Techstack, Core Features, Rules). Copy the prompt or download the Markdown file.

about.title: About VICO
about.desc: VICO (Vibe Coding) is an AI-powered platform that bridges the gap between abstract product ideas and technical execution. We help non-technical founders, product managers, and beginner developers transform their ideas into structured, professional Product Requirement Documents.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: "Dari Obrolan ke Cetak Biru Profesional dalam Hitungan Menit." — We turn informal AI chat sessions into structured PRDs complete with tech stack recommendations, core features, and development rules — all ready for execution.
about.team.title: The Team
footer.description: Automating the documentation layer of product development. Built for modern founders and digital architects.

prd.chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your VICO Assistant. Let's build your next big idea. What kind of product are we generating a PRD for today?
prd.chat.new_feature: Add a new feature to the PRD
about.title: Turning Abstract into Architecture
about.lead: We built VICO to bridge the gap between business vision and technical execution.
about.story_1: Every day, thousands of brilliant product ideas die at the conceptual stage. Why? Because translating a business idea into a technical blueprint that engineers understand takes weeks. VICO exists to solve this bottleneck.
about.tenets.1.title: Absolute Privacy
about.tenets.1.desc: Your ideas are yours. Our system is designed with enterprise-level privacy. Your data and PRD structures are never used to train public AI models.
about.tenets.2.title: Technical Precision
about.tenets.2.desc: VICO doesn't write fiction. We produce architectures and functional requirements ready for execution by engineering teams.
about.tenets.3.title: Pure Acceleration
about.tenets.3.desc: Turning a days-long blueprinting process into minutes, allowing you to focus on innovation.
